model.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
model.description: Google • Preview Gemini model tuned for high-end multimodal reasoning and long-context analysis.

pick.rationale: Florida and Vanderbilt meet for the third time this season in a highly anticipated SEC rematch. While the Commodores recently stunned the Gators with a 91-74 victory in the SEC Tournament semifinals, Florida's overall statistical profile remains superior, boasting top-10 units on both ends of the floor. The Gators' elite fifth-ranked defense should be better prepared to contain Vanderbilt's potent scoring attack in this high-stakes environment. With a nearly six-point advantage in adjusted efficiency margin and the motivation to avenge their recent postseason loss, Florida's balanced execution and overwhelming talent make them the confident pick to advance to the Elite Eight.

reasoningStep.title: Analyze Florida vs Vanderbilt Matchup
reasoningStep.summary: Evaluated the third meeting between these SEC rivals, noting Vanderbilt's recent SEC Tournament win but favoring Florida's superior overall efficiency and elite defense.
evidence: Florida ranks 4th in both KenPom and Torvik, with a top-10 offense and top-5 defense.
Vanderbilt ranks 12th in KenPom and 10th in Torvik, featuring an elite 6th-ranked offense but a 28th-ranked defense.
The teams split their prior matchups this season, with Florida winning a regular-season shootout and Vanderbilt taking the SEC Tournament semifinal 91-74.
Florida holds a 5.7-point advantage in adjusted efficiency margin over Vanderbilt.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: demo-2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: s16-south-1
Current game label: South Sweet 16 1
Round: Sweet 16
Resolved teams: Florida (florida) vs Vanderbilt (vanderbilt)
Prior committed picks: 56
